nodes.name: Schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri 08:00
nodes.notes: Runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday at 08:00 (server timezone = GENERIC_TIMEZONE)

parameters.query:
UPDATE article_topics
SET status = 'processing'
WHERE id = (
  SELECT id FROM article_topics
  WHERE status = 'pending'
  ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING id, topic, notes, priority, created_at;

parameters.name: messages

nodes.name: Generate Article via OpenAI
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI GPT-4o. Swap URL/params for Anthropic, Mistral, etc.

parameters.query:
UPDATE article_topics
SET
  status       = 'done',
  processed_at = NOW(),
  article_title = '{{ $node['Format Article'].json.articleTitle.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  email_sent   = TRUE,
  retry_count  = retry_count
WHERE id = {{ $node['Format Article'].json.topicId }};

INSERT INTO workflow_runs (topic_id, status, n8n_exec_id)
VALUES ({{ $node['Format Article'].json.topicId }}, 'success', '{{ $execution.id }}');

UPDATE article_topics
SET
  status      = CASE WHEN retry_count >= 3 THEN 'error' ELSE 'pending' END,
  retry_count = retry_count + 1,
  error_msg   = 'Workflow execution failed'
WHERE id = {{ $node['Claim Next Pending Topic'].json[0].id }};

parameters.subject: ⚠️ n8n Article Workflow Error
parameters.message:
Article Generation Failed

The scheduled article generation workflow encountered an error.

Topic: {{ $node['Claim Next Pending Topic'].json[0].topic }}

Time: {{ $now }}

Please check the n8n execution log for details.
=No pending topics found. Skipping scheduled run at {{ $now }}.
